subject: My friend Morgan Harper
body:
My friend has a tough race on her hands in Ohio's 3rd district. She needs our help to get her over the finish line. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4e4e5ee452d8/help-my-friend-morgan-harper-unseat-a-corporate-democrat-3866689?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
I wanted to reach out to you and talk to you about my friend, Morgan Harper. She is running a tough race for Congress in Ohio, and she needs our help. She is a progressive leader running to represent the Third Congressional District in Columbus, Ohio (OH-3). She believes we need a new generation of bold leadership in Congress that puts people over profits. That's why Morgan is running as a grassroots candidate advocating for policies that ensure everyone can lead a stable life - that means a commitment to fighting for universal healthcare, housing for all, jobs that pay enough to live, racial justice, and a clean environment by backing the Green New Deal.**Now more than ever, we need leaders like Morgan from across the country winning on progressive values to advocate for these policies in Washington. ** Due to the growing pandemic, Morgan's March primary election date in March was canceled and then changed to extend the window of time to vote by mail-in absentee ballot through April 28. **Her campaign now has just a little more than 2 weeks to urgently reach voters with this new information and ensure they vote.** While the change in the election was necessary, the short window of time to engage voters in an entirely new process will certainly lead to disenfranchisement. As we all navigate the impact of the pandemic, we know many people are struggling with unexpected lost jobs, trying to figure out how to pay their bills, and don’t have time to navigate the state’s arcane, multi-step, absentee ballot process. Morgan's campaign is mobilizing quickly to educate everyone in OH-3 about the new mail-in only ballot procedure and deliver applications for ballots to anyone who needs it. But, reaching all voters with this information is the campaign's biggest challenge so far. Right now, Morgan needs your help to win in her primary challenge against an entrenched incumbent who receives 70% of her fundraising from corporations and special interests and[ profited off of the community's housing problems](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=19038e4bbf&e=140a9b81e7). Despite all of the unexpected changes,**Morgan Harper knows that we can successfully make the case to OH-3 voters about the need for new political leadership and win.** In the face of this global pandemic and economic crisis, we all see that something has to change. Electing political leaders who are free of corporate money is our first, and most important step. When I am sworn into Congress in January of 2021, I want to have Morgan right there with me so that we can fight for our progressive values together.[ Can you chip in to send us both to Washington?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=a59b39a139&e=140a9b81e7) You can also help by joining #Morganizers to phonebank between now and April 28 to inform OH-3 voters about the changed election: [sign up here](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=7670989ced&e=140a9b81e7)! Thank you. Stay safe and be healthy. Dani Brzozowski
Progressive Democrat for Congress, IL-16
---

subject: We Need a Plan

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17122724/183509306/-1907457918?refcode=04032020_em_hdr&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2Q5NjBhNS04YzdkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UWqrh9nyRyX7KuOb-ydLJU-Bg0Vt4uGj2Puq5LlMA3o=)

Dear Friend, As always, I hope this email finds you and yours safe and healthy. President Trump is deciding whether, when, and how to reopen the American economy. This of course is juxtaposed against the menace of COVID-19. I would submit that the president doesn't need a decision, he needs a plan. A plan that defines clear criteria for when and where to ease social distancing, mechanisms to prevent/contain future outbreaks, rules for businesses and assemblage and guidelines to maximize personal safety at each stage of easing, investments to be made in therapeutics to ease suffering and lower the mortality rate, investments to be made in vaccines to eventually achieve herd immunity, and investments and plans to be better prepared for the next incident. He then needs unify our country behind this plan, and he must be 100% truthful when presenting progress against the plan and triggering decision points. Planning and truthfulness have not been hallmarks of the Trump administration, but failure to adopt them will now surely cost more American lives. As a member of Congress, I would consider it my duty to my constituents and to the American people to assist the administration to construct such a plan regardless of policy differences in other areas. name: John Hickenlooper
subject: I hear you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Hey there — I wanted to take a second to check back in. If you’re feeling scared or uncertain about the future, know that you’re not alone — and know that I hear you. We’ve been collecting stories from people about how the coronavirus has impacted them. If you’ve submitted one, thank you. I’ve been spending time reading them, and calling some of you too. Every day, I’ve been thinking about how this crisis is affecting people across our country. I can hardly find the words to express my gratitude for the health care workers, first responders, store clerks, and everyone on the front lines as we fight this virus. And my heart aches for the people who are sick, the workers who have lost income, small businesses, and everyone who is struggling right now. It’s okay to be scared right now — people are losing their jobs, small businesses are closing, we’re all worried about our loved ones’ health, and families across the country are worried about what comes next. I’m fighting to give Colorado the strong leadership we deserve right now. Sometimes, that starts with listening. So, please, I want to hear from you. [**I want to know how the coronavirus (COVID-19) has affected you and your loved ones. If you feel comfortable, please share your story here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17125052/183565846/-1673367037?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGM5ZWVlNC1hMzdkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=enBAjAgQVIHkxMSGSvB3Sn5FPYRv9rWK7CVjdeAq6d0=&emci=8cc9eee4-a37d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=8dc9eee4-a37d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=7280715) If you're willing, we’d love to share these stories, too. Chances are someone else is experiencing something similar to what you’re going through. Even if we’re all keeping our distance from each other, it doesn’t mean we have to go through this alone. Before the end of my first term as Governor, Colorado faced historic floods, ravaging wildfires, and tragic acts of gun violence. In those times — and right now — I’ve seen the pain in our people and communities. But I’ve also seen us come together and get through difficult times by lifting each other up. As we fight this crisis, I’ll be thinking about you — and everyone across our state who is struggling. We’re in this together. Sending all my best, John
---
Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---
Hickenlooper for Colorado
PO Box 18886
Denver, CO 80218
United States
[unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/8cc9eee4-a37d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8/8dc9eee4-a37d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGM5ZWVlNC1hMzdkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=enBAjAgQVIHkxMSGSvB3Sn5FPYRv9rWK7CVjdeAq6d0=&id=109201661&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

name: Eugene DePasquale For Congress
subject: UPDATE: Important information regarding the upcoming election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
There have been a few big updates to this year’s primary election, and we wanted to make sure you have the most up-to-date information on how to safely exercise your right to vote.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17126009/183583572/460726911?refcode=em_info_2020.04.13_b1_edfc_all&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWMzOTRkMC1hYTdkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RzkNRg2F9NAv5UrEIHpqKz3g8f08x3WB92TQ6BQuQ8Y=) Team,

There have been a few big updates to this year’s primary election, and we wanted to make sure you have the most up-to-date information on how to safely exercise your right to vote. **Due to the COVID-19 pandemic, the primary election that was originally scheduled for April 28th has been moved to June 2nd, 2020.** | **[Request a mail-in ballot »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17126010/183583573/-1813083118?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWMzOTRkMC1hYTdkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RzkNRg2F9NAv5UrEIHpqKz3g8f08x3WB92TQ6BQuQ8Y=&emci=37ad41f9-9c7d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=11c394d0-aa7d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249#/OnlineAbsenteeBegin)**
---

In addition, thanks to a new law signed by the Governor in 2019, Pennsylvanians now have the option to vote by mail without listing an excuse and can do so from the safety of their own homes.

Our country is facing big challenges, and it’s more important than ever that we’re electing leaders willing to fight on behalf of all Pennsylvanians. But no one should have to choose between exercising their right to vote and protecting their health. **That’s why we wanted to reach out and encourage you to request a mail-in ballot and vote by mail.**

[**Voting by mail is easy, secure, and ensures Pennsylvanians can safely exercise their right to vote. To vote by mail, simply request a mail-in ballot online by clicking here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17126011/183583574/-1813083118?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWMzOTRkMC1hYTdkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RzkNRg2F9NAv5UrEIHpqKz3g8f08x3WB92TQ6BQuQ8Y=&emci=37ad41f9-9c7d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=11c394d0-aa7d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249#/OnlineAbsenteeBegin)
**[Request a mail-in ballot »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17126012/183583575/-1813083118?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWMzOTRkMC1hYTdkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RzkNRg2F9NAv5UrEIHpqKz3g8f08x3WB92TQ6BQuQ8Y=&emci=37ad41f9-9c7d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=11c394d0-aa7d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249#/OnlineAbsenteeBegin)**
---

**The last day to register to vote for the primary election is May 18th and the last day to request a mail-in ballot for the June 2nd primary is May 26th.** For more information on voting by mail, registering to vote, or updating your voter information, please visit **[https://www.votespa.com/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17126013/183583576/465078964?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWMzOTRkMC1hYTdkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RzkNRg2F9NAv5UrEIHpqKz3g8f08x3WB92TQ6BQuQ8Y=&emci=37ad41f9-9c7d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=11c394d0-aa7d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249). **

Thank you, and please stay safe and healthy!

clean_body: There have been a few big updates to this year’s primary election, and we wanted to make sure you have the most up-to-date information on how to safely exercise your right to vote. = Team, There have been a few big updates to this year’s primary election, and we wanted to make sure you have the most up-to-date information on how to safely exercise your right to vote. Due to the COVID-19 pandemic, the primary election that was originally scheduled for April 28th has been moved to June 2nd, 2020. | In addition, thanks to a new law signed by the Governor in 2019, Pennsylvanians now have the option to vote by mail without listing an excuse and can do so from the safety of their own homes. Our country is facing big challenges, and it’s more important than ever that we’re electing leaders willing to fight on behalf of all Pennsylvanians. But no one should have to choose between exercising their right to vote and protecting their health. That’s why we wanted to reach out and encourage you to request a mail-in ballot and vote by mail. The last day to register to vote for the primary election is May 18th and the last day to request a mail-in ballot for the June 2nd primary is May 26th. For more information on voting by mail, registering to vote, or updating your voter information, please visit . Thank you, and please stay safe and healthy! \--Team Eugene Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates: | = Eugene DePasquale is running to represent Pennsylvania's 10th Congressional District. To learn more, please visit . | Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10 DePasquale for PA 10 P.O. name: Reverend Warnock
subject: Friend, we need you with us.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Let me explain why your support is so critical - and what will happen if we fall short.
| | |
---
Friend: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become one of the 2020 Members we need in our fight to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats. **But first, let me explain why your support is so important - and what will happen if we fall short.**
I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 brothers and sisters, and I grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But, from there, I went on to earn a college degree, and worked my way up to serving as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I have the chance to become the first black senator this state has _ever_ elected.
But the truth is, the opportunities that made my journey possible - from Kayton Homes to Dr. King's pulpit - are growing further and further out of reach for too many people across this country. I'm running for Senate to change that, but I can't win without help of grassroots supporters like you.
**That 's why I'm asking: [Friend, will you chip in before midnight tomorrow to become a 2020 Member of our campaign - so we can flip Georgia blue, take back the Senate for Democrats and build a country in which _everyone_ , no matter who you are or where you come from, has a shot at the American dream?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e74e/288179be/a2aa48c/348e80da/784000686/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTU2LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk156-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
[](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e74e/288179be/a2aa48c/348e80da/784000686/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTU2LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk156-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
The stakes have never been higher: Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight confirms that Democrats can flip the Senate - and analysts at _The Washington Post_ say that winning in Georgia is key to making it happen.
Democrats cannot take back the Senate if we lose this critical battleground state. Plain and simple. That's why Mitch McConnell and the GOP are zeroing in on our race - and why my Republican opponent has already started spending $20 million of her own money against me.
**So please, friend, this is important:[If you care about taking back the Senate for Democrats, I'm counting on you to rush $5 or more right now to become one of the 1,000 essential 2020 Members we need by midnight tomorrow to power forward our fight to flip Georgia blue!](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e74e/288179be/a2aa48c/348e80da/784000686/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTU2LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk156-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you,

Reverend Warnock

body:

We know that right now many people are facing financial hardships, so if you cannot afford to give today -- that 's okay. We appreciate you opening and reading our campaign updates. If you would like to turn off these emails for a bit, then you can do so [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/Hd06vXR5a_2der0V9-JqAw0c7WkCojniRkBAWzDQKq8=/syDYHNGYLQ6kI3soyz_fwvZ_utlp0_hYN6XsRLXN84U=)._
* * *
Peter, On April 12th, 2019, I announced my intention to retire from my position as the representative of Iowa's 2nd District. I'm proud of the work I've done on behalf of the people of Iowa. It's been an honor, and I'm glad to be able to enjoy my retirement with my family. **One of the reasons I was confident in my decision to resign was knowing that I have a strong candidate like Rita waiting to take my place.** **[But this will be a very competitive election. Will you help make sure Rita has what it takes to win and ensure this district doesn't flip red by donating $20 today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/Hd06vXR5a_2der0V9-JqAw0c7WkCojniRkBAWzDQKq8=/2eXS1iVauOBq0nFl_JtiC9FaKOSKWVl7Ofll8vW-lpY=?refcode=200413-email&amount=20)** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: _ | ****[CONTRIBUTE $5>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/Hd06vXR5a_2der0V9-JqAw0c7WkCojniRkBAWzDQKq8=/dClboCv1OFg9Z0WlBr8VsS7UklBb0xMEwYYd7UnvsrQ=?refcode=200413-email&amount=5&express_lane=true)****

| Peter - This is a MUST READ: A recent [report](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o39fiHkqUE6rskpTaE7T0HUGNnH7sZYvTiWjl5YdNA4_gwf2Ek-Th7szGJxSnISu6uXVW-LGl-ieqdvIlQjRAX1X56Y-YWox_STvyZ46u4-_xEgXOr6ueW6sted-RxOiTR_6ss4Q5tHlphe9TeOXfEqqSS0UR3eW4j45zSz_rSZJCIPhFrxuYf4IbwlkBJWgdQ-2n6Z8FR3hRczeY70EgMFuG2wSyfuXJNyWqCB4N-iarRG-LkwvSLXJ9K_cquPc&c=GkoYz2BMFKuNMUC3QpVYLD6FGvIyBJ_9hWjQ8Vpf3csqLeYT7KNeoQ==&ch=ZBPJEtkVVXoeieHok3IbedMFWvahBWs2kLjkQ8H9P2oOKc99CdCnzw==) revealed that a shady group of California liberals is flooding New Mexico with campaign cash to make sure Nancy Pelosi keeps her majority and remains Speaker of the House. I've included portions of the report below.
---
|
* "A secretive group led by Stanford University academics has unleashed millions of dollars in political spending from Silicon Valley and is now convincing some of its biggest donors to spend millions more to back Democrats in 2020."

* "The group's success is due in large part to how it speaks the language of Silicon Valley, donors and operatives say: In 2018, [the secretive group] pitched donors on a statistical model that tried to assess the precise impact of each additional dollar on the chance that Democrats would win the House of Representatives -- as opposed to funding the easiest seats to flip."

* "Wealthy people from tech attracted by the vernacular of risk and return flocked to the group, packing donor briefings at ritzy spots in San Francisco's Pacific Heights neighborhood and sharing the endorsement list with their friends across the tech industry. Those donors then flooded Democratic challengers like Xochitl Torres Small in New Mexico... with as much as $640,000 in high-dollar donations."

---
| These California liberals could care less about us - they only care about power. I don't have a shady group of liberals backing me up, but I do have you, Peter. [If you can, please contribute $5 or more to help us fight back against these California liberals! ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o39fiHkqUE6rskpTaE7T0HUGNnH7sZYvTiWjl5YdNA4_gwf2Ek-Th8cS8LhaJkX8mvpPVbni7HysaWInrTUBv3jGSWDhR6gfV8LwUQi2Be96ArEUqPBxUXVQXa13vaiU0sJvUr7daF8Ti0lyL00NdZ0zZUbfAFTq_Zf5aldnZHCt3Alk0QwGaUBydczC6vec&c=GkoYz2BMFKuNMUC3QpVYLD6FGvIyBJ_9hWjQ8Vpf3csqLeYT7KNeoQ==&ch=ZBPJEtkVVXoeieHok3IbedMFWvahBWs2kLjkQ8H9P2oOKc99CdCnzw==)

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Peter - This is a MUST READ: A recent == revealed that a shady group of California liberals is flooding New Mexico with campaign cash to make sure Nancy Pelosi keeps her majority and remains Speaker of the House. I've included portions of the report below. | "A secretive group led by Stanford University academics has unleashed millions of dollars in political spending from Silicon Valley and is now convincing some of its biggest donors to spend millions more to back Democrats in 2020." "The group's success is due in large part to how it speaks the language of Silicon Valley, donors and operatives say: In 2018, [the secretive group] pitched donors on a statistical model that tried to assess the precise impact of each additional dollar on the chance that Democrats would win the House of Representatives -- as opposed to funding the easiest seats to flip." * "Wealthy people from tech attracted by the vernacular of risk and return flocked to the group, packing donor briefings at ritzy spots in San Francisco's Pacific Heights neighborhood and sharing the endorsement list with their friends across the tech industry. Those donors then flooded Democratic challengers like Xochitl Torres Small in New Mexico... with as much as $640,000 in high-dollar donations." | These California liberals could care less about us - they only care about power. Peter, **Donald Trump is attacking one of our most important government institutions — the United States Postal Service. ** The national shut-down has hurt USPS. It is bringing in less income, and the working conditions have become much more difficult. The organization needs financial support. But while Trump and the Republicans are providing billions and billions to their favored companies, they hate the Postal Service. Trump even said he wouldn’t sign the stimulus bill—which provided an essential lifeline for the unemployed and small businesses—if it included support for the Postal Service.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17127542/183615161/716096117?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTlkNDc3Yi1iOTdkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YF1Yk7OuIwRXzsw9P_YNp13OO3jdzjlWGORWrhsUNkM=&emci=1cb02774-b97d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=ce9d477b-b97d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6233172)
The attack on USPS is an attack on all of us. The Post Office is one of the rare public programs that unites the country. It provides an essential lifeline for rural America, and for millions of people who rely on medicine delivery. Our elections increasingly depend on vote by mail. And hundreds of thousands of Americans—some of our most trusted public servants—work for USPS. **[We need you to take action. Please sign our petition to save USPS today — and send it to everyone you know.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17127543/183615162/716096117?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTlkNDc3Yi1iOTdkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YF1Yk7OuIwRXzsw9P_YNp13OO3jdzjlWGORWrhsUNkM=&emci=1cb02774-b97d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=ce9d477b-b97d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6233172)**
[Sign the petition and help save the postal service!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17127544/183615163/716096117?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTlkNDc3Yi1iOTdkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YF1Yk7OuIwRXzsw9P_YNp13OO3jdzjlWGORWrhsUNkM=&emci=1cb02774-b97d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=ce9d477b-b97d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6233172)
**When I am in Congress, I will fight hard to keep USPS running. Let’s protect our public institutions — and make sure government works for the people.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Sen. Rick Scott: WHO Failed the World with COVID-19 Pandemic
body:
"Amid the coronavirus pandemic and Communist China’s New Cold War with the United States, the World Health Organization (WHO) has served as a..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=525dbcfd7b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Sen. Rick Scott: WHO Failed the World with COVID-19 Pandemic**

“Amid the coronavirus pandemic and Communist China’s New Cold War with the United States, the World Health Organization (WHO) has served as a puppet for the Chinese Communist Party,” Sen. Rick Scott (R-FL) writes in Fox News.

“American taxpayers are the largest contributor to the WHO budget. There needs to be accountability for their failures and their willingness to help China hide the coronavirus from the world.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2320b07f7b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| New information from a Justice Department inspector general report on the FBI’s spying into the 2016 Trump campaign should concern every American. “Let [this] sink in. The FBI knew that at least some of its evidence against the Trump campaign, and maybe more, was likely part of a Russian disinformation campaign,” Sen. Ron Johnson (R-WI) writes in [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=991c1a6758&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| President Trump released an Easter Sunday greeting video from the White House yesterday. “This Easter will be much different than others because in many cases, we’ll be separated physically only from our churches . . . We’re getting rid of the plague,” he said. “We’re winning the battle.” Read more from Charlie Spiering in [_Breitbart_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c31d8ca7b5&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “As we medical professionals brace for the influx of patients and make the necessary preparations, I am reassured by the seriousness with which President Donald Trump is taking the situation and by the specific assistance his administration has provided doctors and other professionals on the front line of this pandemic,” Robin Armstrong writes in the [_Fort Worth Star-Telegram_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0febb558d1&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1d96b6d5a5&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d6da51b435&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=c192973873)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

We'll be blunt, Peter:

**Fighting back against Sen. Cornyn and all of his big-money backers won 't be easy.** Last quarter, he reported having over $12 MILLION in the bank thanks to special interests like the pharmaceutical and insurance industries, and he'll likely report an even bigger number this quarter.

The good news is we've got something Sen. Cornyn doesn't: **grassroots support from hardworking folks all over Texas.** That means we don't need to match his fundraising dollar-for-dollar -- we just need to raise enough to spread MJ's message across Texas before voters go to the polls!
**[MAKE A MATCHED DONATION TO HELP!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489036b/7f51f7bc/4f4c59e6/4ef12308/914893970/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMDkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-weekendmatch?refcode=email_20200413.2nd__1209__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
**All donations to MJ 's campaign are being matched until midnight tonight. If you're in a position to give right now (we know not everyone is), please donate before the deadline so that your contribution will have DOUBLE the impact!**

subject: The Senate is in play
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY GARDNER FOR SENATE
body:
I'm bumping the email that we sent to you the other day because I know Team Gardner has relied on your support in the past. Will you continue to stand with Cory by stepping up again today on behalf of his grassroots initiatives in Colorado?
Friend,

Did you get our email the other day? (See forwarded message below).
It's true, Democrats fully believe that the Senate is in play this November and that they have a chance to flip the Majority to their favor.

However, what Chuck Schumer and his far-Left allies forget is the strong heart and resolve of Americans everywhere, and in particular Coloradans.

I'm bumping the email that we sent to you the other day because I know Team Gardner has relied on your support in the past. Will you continue to stand with Cory by stepping up again today on behalf of his grassroots initiatives in Colorado?
[**DONATE HERE**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001S2cAAuzOPOk67rZAM6eSZMIviZ2lNPtzKV6bYsv6ggqIGGOJ5P427Q9qrJE_HVVcMXzE51RB2CajLskOEt0Jc9ZbhOYutWw7WMZZ3u_91GvS3le4TPxsWHqtEAyYTvs537A0dnQGihCwEVQ12sZItk5rex7wiN87UzY2rVIz5cOVKwuKnSv5-s6gpzmW4yFPQYLq7sFM77AvFMEDJQQhXqMVoPKYIRhU_E8HWgKwpMHOkTBOSTvkT5rX_XpPkcC7YWIobfI64MnLREwG4Vo6vdSUF-Xrstt96RXmREdicbXZLQJPM8r3WolsIr64AJhRLF-UdPvGT42jXT9NQeMumIAjckO6d2Khf9FvOWNXrW8-QkE_cvknxHLlwJo3BKA5ustIYdtDw-1Cmy0LJlRf8SJvCsnZfKI2&c=QEYhRLKvjJGQ-XmT1WET2WOI-_NZmQ6UbluGiv8jzFi2dxxiEYjvCg==&ch=QkgRg5_HCetTS1l1XnxMSTa4axKcqkFWCYPuaK1NJO68D2wYtlsvfQ==)

Nate

Democrats believe that the Senate is up for grabs.

**Everyone from Chuck Schumer to failed presidential candidate John Hickenlooper has stated that Cory Gardner 's seat is their best chance to flip the Senate blue. **

However, what Hickenlooper, Schumer, and their far-Left allies continue to get wrong is that Coloradans will **_never back down_** when it comes to protecting their independent voices. That's why giving common-sense leaders like Cory the chance to continue fighting for the **_real needs_** of hard-working Coloradans and Americans everywhere is critical at this juncture.

Cory needs patriots like YOU by his side, sending an unmistakable response to the far-Left that you refuse to back down to their out-of-touch and divisive agenda. [**Will you pledge your support today towards Cory 's mission to continue leading on behalf of Coloradans and providing the common-sense approach to legislating that Americans so urgently need right now?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001S2cAAuzOPOk67rZAM6eSZMIviZ2lNPtzKV6bYsv6ggqIGGOJ5P427Q9qrJE_HVVcMXzE51RB2CajLskOEt0Jc9ZbhOYutWw7WMZZ3u_91GvS3le4TPxsWHqtEAyYTvs537A0dnQGihCwEVQ12sZItk5rex7wiN87UzY2rVIz5cOVKwuKnSv5-s6gpzmW4yFPQYLq7sFM77AvFMEDJQQhXqMVoPKYIRhU_E8HWgKwpMHOkTBOSTvkT5rX_XpPkcC7YWIobfI64MnLREwG4Vo6vdSUF-Xrstt96RXmREdicbXZLQJPM8r3WolsIr64AJhRLF-UdPvGT42jXT9NQeMumIAjckO6d2Khf9FvOWNXrW8-QkE_cvknxHLlwJo3BKA5ustIYdtDw-1Cmy0LJlRf8SJvCsnZfKI2&c=QEYhRLKvjJGQ-XmT1WET2WOI-_NZmQ6UbluGiv8jzFi2dxxiEYjvCg==&ch=QkgRg5_HCetTS1l1XnxMSTa4axKcqkFWCYPuaK1NJO68D2wYtlsvfQ==)

| | Folks, we finally know where our finish line is: **April 28th is the deadline for voters to mail in their ballots, and the election is 100% by mail.** This is a big change for a lot of people -- there will definitely be questions about how to request and return ballots, and likely some errors in folks not receiving them. My team and I have put together a plan to protect this election -- take a look: [](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_april?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200413_ProtectDemocracy_U2_X1&amount=25&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200413_ProtectDemocracy_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200413_ProtectDemocracy_U2_X1") We need to raise this money before Wednesday so we have enough to continue our voter outreach ahead of our election -- which ends in just 15 days. name: Charles Booker
subject: 4 years ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
(CW: gun violence and death) TJ’s death changed my life. It pushed me to get up, live out my purpose and fight for change. Now his death anniversary is a solemn reminder of what’s at stake in this election and what this fight is really about.
#
_Content Warning: The following email includes descriptions of gun violence, death, and the loss of a loved one that may be disturbing to some. Please take care of yourself first and skip this email if need be._
* * *
Four years ago my cousin, TJ, was murdered on Easter Sunday.
Each year I replay it. This is a day we celebrate life, but I always feel his loss.
TJ’s death changed my life. It pushed me to get up, live out my purpose and fight for change. Now, the anniversary of his death is a solemn reminder of what’s at stake in this election and what this fight is really about.
**It’s more than just winning an election**. It’s about the innocent lives like my cousin’s that are taken away by gun violence. It’s about the chance at an American Dream that Mitch is robbing from thousands of families. And it’s about sending a clear message that there are real consequences to Mitch’s politics.
**[Will you show your support today for our fight to defeat Mitch? Please chip in $5 or anything you can today to our grassroots campaign. It would give me so much strength knowing that you’re in this struggle with me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17129512/183662214/198153943?refcode=em20200413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2E0NDljZC1jYzdkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7DiMrdZpkouturzVPqNU6q0_sgdCkmh2EYDRtT2wsUo=)**
****[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17129513/183662215/198153943?refcode=em20200413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2E0NDljZC1jYzdkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7DiMrdZpkouturzVPqNU6q0_sgdCkmh2EYDRtT2wsUo=)****
It’s as simple as this.
Senseless gun violence will continue to take the lives of our sons, daughters, cousins, brothers, and sisters if we don’t stand up to the NRA and pass common sense gun safety laws.
Thousands will continue to die of coronavirus and other treatable health problems if we don’t stand up to Big Pharma and pass Medicare for All.
And there will never be justice for the people as long as corporate donors control our politicians.
**Bills to help address all of these problems are sitting on Mitch McConnell’s desk, but he doesn’t take action. Instead, he laughs and calls himself the Grim Reaper, while members of my family and members of my community continue to die from senseless, preventable gun violence.**
If we want real change, it starts with replacing the Grim Reaper with a progressive champion whose only loyalty is to the people of Kentucky. We have a real shot at pulling this off, but first we need to build a grassroots movement that will reach voters in every corner of our state.
**[Will you chip in $5 to fund this movement and add your name in the fight for real, progressive change this election season?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17129527/183662229/198153943?refcode=em20200413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2E0NDljZC1jYzdkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7DiMrdZpkouturzVPqNU6q0_sgdCkmh2EYDRtT2wsUo=)**
****[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17129528/183662230/198153943?refcode=em20200413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2E0NDljZC1jYzdkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7DiMrdZpkouturzVPqNU6q0_sgdCkmh2EYDRtT2wsUo=)****
Together,
Charles

** **

****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17129529/183662231/198153943?refcode=em20200413-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2E0NDljZC1jYzdkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7DiMrdZpkouturzVPqNU6q0_sgdCkmh2EYDRtT2wsUo=)****
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17129530/183662232/-640535987?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2E0NDljZC1jYzdkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7DiMrdZpkouturzVPqNU6q0_sgdCkmh2EYDRtT2wsUo=&emci=8654d0a8-bc7d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=27a449cd-cc7d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17129531/183662233/-778353598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2E0NDljZC1jYzdkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7DiMrdZpkouturzVPqNU6q0_sgdCkmh2EYDRtT2wsUo=&emci=8654d0a8-bc7d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=27a449cd-cc7d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17129532/183662234/-1403296926?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2E0NDljZC1jYzdkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7DiMrdZpkouturzVPqNU6q0_sgdCkmh2EYDRtT2wsUo=&emci=8654d0a8-bc7d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=27a449cd-cc7d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570)

name: Petition Updates
subject: Communist Lies
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY GARDNER FOR SENATE
body:
It is critical now that we form a united response to China's malicious actions since the outbreak began and support leaders like Senator Cory Gardner (R-CO), who are working to ensure that American lives are protected while also holding China accountable.
Friend,

The COVID-19 outbreak has had a profound effect on almost all facets of American life. Hospital workers, first responders, and essential personnel are working overtime to adapt as the virus continues to spread throughout the country.

It is critical now that we form a united response to China's malicious actions since the outbreak began and support leaders like Senator Cory Gardner (R-CO), who are working to ensure that American lives are protected while also holding China accountable.

**_If you want to stand up to China 's Communist government and send a message that you reject the far-Left's dismissal of it's responsibility for the spread of COVID-19, then add your name below NOW: _**

**[**STAND UP TO CHINA - SIGN YOUR NAME**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001poRX1nrRKTnI1GlwyyJG_RyUEXsAaPgfq0Ef8V0zcNuw8SeaRbFQs9M0WrSemkxQ9caDlnDSynktSDpxmZ3-xWD2wCKGfgzjE2ToFf2u8_T6oD276qCeYbGyfiROUj2HhY5wyYtjQCUdU_MhS4UnC6-cNGtP7zxhEgGWjp6aw_OQUbu0u-3GtTKXN6ltlNvoL2jnVlp-RqKUKrctdlFNIdmsHvA-tnv7sIroBosqvDAq82f66IqG62yLIEErOrhgkT7Ng0btZsHj8viRJx4se26V-RsjGO0cP-D4bnbVH-2ESUnTIWxB1EggAg-dgigX7Hl84coWUoyMqrBxWVe-gc2V34XtEPwRGQNOSHZpd5SczYEwa_EK-A==&c=z0ajjq9V7IbYN6SBlf3ZwzBYLLiP07PIuqRCNXgXa51gFKeEniGGcQ==&ch=_i9tUaWIUWRzWtsXNgVk2RBnrmI9dilh6NT6gfJ89yPNzeFsgxaduA==)**
---

As we continue to come together as a nation and fight back against this outbreak, we must take action to reveal the truth about the negligent acts facilitated by China's Communist regime. _**China 's dangerous disinformation campaign aimed at shifting the blame of this pandemic is a disgrace, which is why I firmly believe that we must hold China's government accountable immediately.**_
Just earlier last week, Cory called for an inter-agency task force under the National Security Council to counter China's anti-American propaganda campaigns. This is just one of the many steps that Cory and fellow Senate Republicans are carrying out - but there is more to be done. _**Will you join the fight?**__**
**_

**[**STAND UP TO CHINA - SIGN YOUR NAME**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001poRX1nrRKTnI1GlwyyJG_RyUEXsAaPgfq0Ef8V0zcNuw8SeaRbFQs9M0WrSemkxQ9caDlnDSynktSDpxmZ3-xWD2wCKGfgzjE2ToFf2u8_T6oD276qCeYbGyfiROUj2HhY5wyYtjQCUdU_MhS4UnC6-cNGtP7zxhEgGWjp6aw_OQUbu0u-3GtTKXN6ltlNvoL2jnVlp-RqKUKrctdlFNIdmsHvA-tnv7sIroBosqvDAq82f66IqG62yLIEErOrhgkT7Ng0btZsHj8viRJx4se26V-RsjGO0cP-D4bnbVH-2ESUnTIWxB1EggAg-dgigX7Hl84coWUoyMqrBxWVe-gc2V34XtEPwRGQNOSHZpd5SczYEwa_EK-A==&c=z0ajjq9V7IbYN6SBlf3ZwzBYLLiP07PIuqRCNXgXa51gFKeEniGGcQ==&ch=_i9tUaWIUWRzWtsXNgVk2RBnrmI9dilh6NT6gfJ89yPNzeFsgxaduA==)**
---

Thanks in advance for signing your name to stand up to China's Communist government. _

PS: As always, please stay home and help us flatten the curve of transmission with this virus. Make sure to continue to look out for your neighbors and loved ones as we weather this battle. America 's future relies on the commitment of ALL Americans to follow social distancing guidelines at the direction of healthcare professionals. So remember to stay safe and stay home._
PAID FOR BY CORY GARDNER FOR SENATE

name: Team Steel
subject: Can we count on you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress

We had a lot of momentum coming out of the primary and it's all but come to a halt.

We had a lot of momentum coming out of the primary, and it has all but come to a halt. It's no easy task, but we need to make up lost ground if we're going to have a fighting chance come November.
[**CHIP IN TO THE STEEL VICTORY FUND**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KI-fiPcDOLCWh3reqqLC9ELpLqxkfVuMv5EguwA7-7gP387tns1hPMHoghTmoWhHC_73fUruxCAmBlQOwVSwpph53ONbMNx93QB1SzKAscY9UJ6Oxx-N_Q15O60J-NH_58y0gU9xhBAh_jQ511iaL2vw72rLd07RbaARGei8AAP2Mm-61MXax-p4UeMKaaxhW3HXdyXgwSjT12IpjmE7ig1xVsw-WEIKzhRLiTr0YCb81FYpX-q8ZhgaSRhw5uQMxPMNMXUa77_PSKdcg3Iq_j5IHLfUVglPsBk-kJB6qw3se2aN57eUQOxCwX7TNdHkh43HMK9FZmbB-1o4ULoT-oUoLfFret_mA3sxncTbG7LmTirQ13SG3EdWSPz6fpaf&c=y7rmXYkoQiFbR0MTlpZ-5FF5lrL-wfX7d7uLFWVmqPv0FNBl8CAi3Q==&ch=6D_H06BAoQ24iFydKRV2VFrjWK_--1VDFgeeWT_-hm5IqLrXIjSvOA==)

Michelle Steel is fighting for common-sense reforms that will help families make ends meet. That means lowering taxes, improving education, and fighting for a better, brighter future for California.

This is a critical moment for this campaign -_one that will determine who wins this seat_. [**Can we count on your support?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KI-fiPcDOLCWh3reqqLC9ELpLqxkfVuMv5EguwA7-7gP387tns1hPMHoghTmoWhHIlpYQYqUH1_IdHyCzk-vJs5MKsSgo3bBBuA0cHJMO4OLp63twds76rmup2mTo2Nek1gBOUcl8Igvi8I8_E7vFjGAV-DOKyQywp3UkBc4GGGdbQdtExBPN7YSs5AYS2MUSPb3JFfKDfWpY9mKRlZ0ZEwum7z--j4RDdPI36N7HZNr_frA705BZyijipIA4283WMjCpT5A-RBw1a8DxacxPg6h6b65h4A_wsdX6wqH7JamECxualgrlHKw69UZ3CiU3wVvnZkS0rbOBHNfGY_yS-enr82W4Cqdkztw9HcEkOPhuf6QREomRdRcQwA0MDjI&c=y7rmXYkoQiFbR0MTlpZ-5FF5lrL-wfX7d7uLFWVmqPv0FNBl8CAi3Q==&ch=6D_H06BAoQ24iFydKRV2VFrjWK_--1VDFgeeWT_-hm5IqLrXIjSvOA==)
Thank you,

Team Steel
With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help. name: Spencer
subject: Friend - are you conservative?
body:
Friend, I just got off of a conference call with my campaign team.
My biggest takeaway: we need at least 400 more Texans to step up and help me defend my campaign from the leftist attacks being levied against us.
It only takes a minute or two, and your contribution, no matter the size, will make all the difference.
Long story short: I need you to be one of the 400 Texans who chip in BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.
I asked my team to make a personalized donate link for you to use, so I can make sure you've been counted.
It's here for your use: **[Friend](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r2X7r8etXXnUsDMzb0fUwpdGQHaBjB1195kVtOA7LXmoYNeNsoipoZF15oLceXkdtB7aj7VhrcYHkdjovSFZQ60jWsW22KkFS8z-8VWpBXib4EQTGXLedFyeMUyoE1BxcnOgfz_14vc5GZQxiSbBl90KqSIJlLAIqCAJFh6u4k49NaWBzGBkZ2IjVa9FIUHQvJU_PhtFlH25zOBq8u6yR4UkOknx_TKB6WvRJFb8o0qjb7Z728CAjr4Bp13pyWI2ULc_JxVfO76NQvpzXOhmO32cvoNRxPYEkDlRNRnjvxdLaafxyN4vtGkbmalgqR0T2ClSaJvAMKwrabmKHmOMwYAeKBPgt8SyZgkUYFLXxMCfyW20kLcyIQ==&c=PPv19HOUE0KnjVVelcNjNpGhDUZLt61bsq5j34_E11gzvDIqXy28tw==&ch=twZ5ftNLqdcWhb5_T2IvTB8AHmHYUI2KM2b_7xISAnB2_tBfGz5M2g==)**
This is serious. **[I'm really counting on you to step up now.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r2X7r8etXXnUsDMzb0fUwpdGQHaBjB1195kVtOA7LXmoYNeNsoipoZF15oLceXkdtB7aj7VhrcYHkdjovSFZQ60jWsW22KkFS8z-8VWpBXib4EQTGXLedFyeMUyoE1BxcnOgfz_14vc5GZQxiSbBl90KqSIJlLAIqCAJFh6u4k49NaWBzGBkZ2IjVa9FIUHQvJU_PhtFlH25zOBq8u6yR4UkOknx_TKB6WvRJFb8o0qjb7Z728CAjr4Bp13pyWI2ULc_JxVfO76NQvpzXOhmO32cvoNRxPYEkDlRNRnjvxdLaafxyN4vtGkbmalgqR0T2ClSaJvAMKwrabmKHmOMwYAeKBPgt8SyP5m2DJVGVjBuwtcwecn6bA==&c=PPv19HOUE0KnjVVelcNjNpGhDUZLt61bsq5j34_E11gzvDIqXy28tw==&ch=twZ5ftNLqdcWhb5_T2IvTB8AHmHYUI2KM2b_7xISAnB2_tBfGz5M2g==)**
-Senator John Cornyn Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r2X7r8etXXnUsDMzb0fUwpdGQHaBjB1195kVtOA7LXmoYNeNsoipoQEti8gxlaVHvDacEL065sReBPqNmOD7_xbTDTyiw1Ua-ncqbwqh9E9ialxLITnwOsRo5eqCLRmOQIuZyYXAB9TJkwQ4DGwq21p_0Ot8h4W1-e0DFSEZbjc=&c=PPv19HOUE0KnjVVelcNjNpGhDUZLt61bsq5j34_E11gzvDIqXy28tw==&ch=twZ5ftNLqdcWhb5_T2IvTB8AHmHYUI2KM2b_7xISAnB2_tBfGz5M2g==) and [Twitter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r2X7r8etXXnUsDMzb0fUwpdGQHaBjB1195kVtOA7LXmoYNeNsoipoZF15oLceXkd7x-yt4ovFeEhVDdyw8_VbdmeDJgkL-GkCEGOZr4ZFdFYeA-4WS4Kuu3m2AHbaSSUyLMobiuGBqz3XDB8g-_QPbNcnWKMF47q&c=PPv19HOUE0KnjVVelcNjNpGhDUZLt61bsq5j34_E11gzvDIqXy28tw==&ch=twZ5ftNLqdcWhb5_T2IvTB8AHmHYUI2KM2b_7xISAnB2_tBfGz5M2g==) \- that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're really ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn [this song](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r2X7r8etXXnUsDMzb0fUwpdGQHaBjB1195kVtOA7LXmoYNeNsoipoQEti8gxlaVHE6HqzSCjACJ4-IkOhzMktz5EH7FhrdqOQefL7NUcIUueFKSVDu5prhBHOp9k6-8ZGcwAAHTUmJa7Gn59Is9krLZrv-TpnWZwBsArSkKczK5kwHahoeMFvQ==&c=PPv19HOUE0KnjVVelcNjNpGhDUZLt61bsq5j34_E11gzvDIqXy28tw==&ch=twZ5ftNLqdcWhb5_T2IvTB8AHmHYUI2KM2b_7xISAnB2_tBfGz5M2g==) up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. subject: Pelosi is targeting Mike’s seat

body:
This message contains graphics. If you do not see the graphics, [click here to view](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDIyNTExMDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&j=MTc0MTM5MDU0NAS2&mt=1&rt=0).

Nancy Pelosi is targeting Mike's seat because of his history of standing up to her political games in Congress.
If you would prefer not to receive future emails, [visit here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=NDIyNTExMDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTM5MDU0NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[ ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=NDIyNTExMDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTM5MDU0NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Peter,
[_**Did you see the message that Mike sent the other day?**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=NDIyNTExMDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTM5MDU0NAS2&mt=1&rt=0) Nancy Pelosi is targeting Mike's seat because of his history of standing up to her political games in Congress. She announced that her deep pocketed national campaign committee is targeting his key congressional seat!
We must show Nancy that Ohioans are against her continued political games in Congress. [_**Please add your name today to join Team Turner and help us defend this key Ohio district in November! >>> **_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=NDIyNTExMDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTM5MDU0NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
For the last two years, Pelosi has focused solely on obstructing America's progress. She has wasted taxpayer funds on a partisan impeachment investigation, obstructed important legislation, and has even stalled the economic relief package before her demands were met. If she were to get her way and Mike is defeated, it would be an absolute disaster for this district.
[_**If you agree, please add your name to help us continue to protect this key district from Pelosi and her outside influence this Fall?**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=NDIyNTExMDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTM5MDU0NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[**_Stand with Mike Turner and defend Dayton! >>> _**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=NDIyNTExMDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTM5MDU0NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
In order to protect Dayton and the Miami Valley, we're going to have to stand together today to help Mike Turner win in November. [_**Can you help?**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=NDIyNTExMDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTM5MDU0NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[_**Stand with Mike Turner today! >>> **_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=NDIyNTExMDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTM5MDU0NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Rob, Team Turner
**[**Sign your name HERE!**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDIyNTExMDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTM5MDU0NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: Can I Count on You to Commit?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Lewis for Senate
body:
With the rise of radical, progressive, socialist-inspired policies and so-called "leaders" that the Left is supporting, it is imperative now, more than ever, that conservatives around the country continue to stand strong to protect our Republican agenda.

Since my father won the Presidency in 2016, conservatives united and came together to deliver on their promises to the American people.

The Democrats, meanwhile, made it their mission to obstruct the Republican agenda. We've seen since then that their desperation reached the ultimate low -- they attempted, and FAILED, to impeach and convict my father, all for the partisan, political points. But this sick and disgusting show of political theater is just about the only thing the Left could agree on.

The Democrats saw over TWO DOZEN candidates throw their hat in the ring for President and have been caught up in their own infighting, with **socialist Bernie Sanders now emerging as the frontrunner.**

**With the rise of radical, progressive, socialist-inspired policies and so-called "leaders" that the Left is supporting, it is imperative now, more than ever, that conservatives around the country continue to stand strong to protect our Republican agenda.**

Jason Lewis is a proven conservative and former congressman who is running for Senate in Minnesota, a battleground state CRITICAL to victory in November. **My father and I are proud to support Jason and his fight to defeat the radical liberal sitting Senator who has been nothing more than a rubber stamp for the progressive Left.**

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DGJ4V2qFXMF4sYY4zggWyBqgPVu-UHHIlXbJFfKrRPPhKE2sB9EXBBF84qh_6ommYuhpVd_mcLWALg2QxZ2JyjxnO8TJyB82brl4rRUhyfyCJWCQ6Lsy7UZg5yWPBJiXcI-8tq7S_5I4_BP7lTwGp9npB0mAJUCYg2GBma4pMKWo9WXXv5Iv4b7-etOBSHmxYmIlRwSlkdW27O1Ysf7x5G3nmooZM2Qzr0oeuqmGBpoEoDPdBcnKiKaoGI_mrRESuZ-OB5ynfob0keHBCcn40N17HZCDFM5saWVunWJG9140cudWhHvRu9iyFSRnb4aDsN__NpfWCCQ5p6f5tj52OgM6kLDrMYctygMw27WzxYW2fI_B_9TT3g==&c=K6xJP9vIIvMNHga2z-44DCqkPYHksRG0BrYGzt3e-WfsODEJCguXXg==&ch=U6g0aHWVGwFxZvNi8Z4oV8Ppjqfj--eynyRhr61koRLSSaLTMLXYWg==)

Jason needs our help to continue building one of the biggest movements Minnesota has ever seen. He's committed to advancing the Republican agenda and leading with conservative values and leadership. [_**Can we count on you to make a donation right now and commit to joining Jason 's fight to flip Minnesota red?**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DGJ4V2qFXMF4sYY4zggWyBqgPVu-UHHIlXbJFfKrRPPhKE2sB9EXBBF84qh_6ommYuhpVd_mcLWALg2QxZ2JyjxnO8TJyB82brl4rRUhyfyCJWCQ6Lsy7UZg5yWPBJiXcI-8tq7S_5I4_BP7lTwGp9npB0mAJUCYg2GBma4pMKWo9WXXv5Iv4b7-etOBSHmxYmIlRwSlkdW27O1Ysf7x5G3nmooZM2Qzr0oeuqmGBpoEoDPdBcnKiKaoGI_mrRESuZ-OB5ynfob0keHBCcn40N17HZCDFM5saWVunWJG9140cudWhHvRu9iyFSRnb4aDsN__NpfWCCQ5p6f5tj52OgM6kLDrMYctygMw27WzxYW2fI_B_9TT3g==&c=K6xJP9vIIvMNHga2z-44DCqkPYHksRG0BrYGzt3e-WfsODEJCguXXg==&ch=U6g0aHWVGwFxZvNi8Z4oV8Ppjqfj--eynyRhr61koRLSSaLTMLXYWg==)

[**< < DONATE >>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DGJ4V2qFXMF4sYY4zggWyBqgPVu-UHHIlXbJFfKrRPPhKE2sB9EXBBF84qh_6ommYuhpVd_mcLWALg2QxZ2JyjxnO8TJyB82brl4rRUhyfyCJWCQ6Lsy7UZg5yWPBJiXcI-8tq7S_5I4_BP7lTwGp9npB0mAJUCYg2GBma4pMKWo9WXXv5Iv4b7-etOBSHmxYmIlRwSlkdW27O1Ysf7x5G3nmooZM2Qzr0oeuqmGBpoEoDPdBcnKiKaoGI_mrRESuZ-OB5ynfob0keHBCcn40N17HZCDFM5saWVunWJG9140cudWhHvRu9iyFSRnb4aDsN__NpfWCCQ5p6f5tj52OgM6kLDrMYctygMw27WzxYW2fI_B_9TT3g==&c=K6xJP9vIIvMNHga2z-44DCqkPYHksRG0BrYGzt3e-WfsODEJCguXXg==&ch=U6g0aHWVGwFxZvNi8Z4oV8Ppjqfj--eynyRhr61koRLSSaLTMLXYWg==)

The outcome of Jason's campaign is entirely dependent on support from grassroots activists like you, who are dedicated to defending the progress we've made over the past three years under conservative leadership.

I can't stress how important this race is to our success after 2020. Minnesota has the potential to pick up a Senate seat and strengthen our Republican Senate Majority, in addition to electing its first Republican president since President Nixon in 1972.

Will you join us in making history in Minnesota? [**Make a donation to Jason Lewis today!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DGJ4V2qFXMF4sYY4zggWyBqgPVu-UHHIlXbJFfKrRPPhKE2sB9EXBBF84qh_6ommYuhpVd_mcLWALg2QxZ2JyjxnO8TJyB82brl4rRUhyfyCJWCQ6Lsy7UZg5yWPBJiXcI-8tq7S_5I4_BP7lTwGp9npB0mAJUCYg2GBma4pMKWo9WXXv5Iv4b7-etOBSHmxYmIlRwSlkdW27O1Ysf7x5G3nmooZM2Qzr0oeuqmGBpoEoDPdBcnKiKaoGI_mrRESuZ-OB5ynfob0keHBCcn40N17HZCDFM5saWVunWJG9140cudWhHvRu9iyFSRnb4aDsN__NpfWCCQ5p6f5tj52OgM6kLDrMYctygMw27WzxYW2fI_B_9TT3g==&c=K6xJP9vIIvMNHga2z-44DCqkPYHksRG0BrYGzt3e-WfsODEJCguXXg==&ch=U6g0aHWVGwFxZvNi8Z4oV8Ppjqfj--eynyRhr61koRLSSaLTMLXYWg==)

Donald Trump Jr.

**[**DONATE**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DGJ4V2qFXMF4sYY4zggWyBqgPVu-UHHIlXbJFfKrRPPhKE2sB9EXBBF84qh_6omm_xQLTz5XMfuhipMlrOHYfSScSd2W39iXF3D9QY8okjF8rAOJERsXy3SeZUMd3qxnVSk4F67DKVT-fT4Dux3dUJ-TzQQRKh3TADr2V_muor-TpQt5_XFpvPNIhqda_F3ENoVfAKzQOLZH3nNzPGCujI5mb2wYtjs3t6ANyuTMxzNc0fTcQqIV1djts6f0dLfwo2TBfA86Wt_Avf40XOcphcicaU7BYMSBLtwwlQjO2K-IZSKeodI0IH7G68BxupiigGLSjjpkEmspmBEjeF8b7pakHE1ztrAJuT_Wlc28xmZSTJFVpf5BIw==&c=K6xJP9vIIvMNHga2z-44DCqkPYHksRG0BrYGzt3e-WfsODEJCguXXg==&ch=U6g0aHWVGwFxZvNi8Z4oV8Ppjqfj--eynyRhr61koRLSSaLTMLXYWg==)**

name: Tina Smith
subject: An explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Hello — In just a moment, I'm going to ask you to contribute to my campaign for U.S. Senate — but first, you deserve to know exactly how this pandemic will affect our work moving forward. I hope you'll give me a moment to explain why this request is so important. We are facing an unprecedented pandemic that has touched every aspect of our daily lives. Our campaign is no exception. That’s why my team and I are working to fundamentally change and adapt our operation in this new reality. We have already closed our offices and canceled our in-person events. I am committed to keeping my team safe and healthy, so I asked them to stay home. It was the right thing to do, and I’m proud of them for adapting so quickly. I know the news can be difficult to look at these days — and I’ll be honest, the past few weeks have felt like an eternity. But we’re continuing our fight in the Senate to provide additional funding and support for folks and their families. And I won’t stop fighting until this is all over. In times like these, that’s the only thing we can do. The best way to fight back is to invest in a better — safer — future. Your $5 or $10 donation to our campaign is much more than just a few dollars. It’s a sign of your commitment to the fights that matter most. It’s a sign that even when we face challenges, we’re ready to keep working to make this country stronger. **So, what do you say? Can you chip in a donation of $10 or any amount you can afford to support our campaign today? These are difficult times, so I only want you to pitch in if you are financially able to. clean_body: | Hello — In just a moment, I'm going to ask you to contribute to my campaign for U.S. Senate — but first, you deserve to know exactly how this pandemic will affect our work moving forward. I hope you'll give me a moment to explain why this request is so important. We are facing an unprecedented pandemic that has touched every aspect of our daily lives. Our campaign is no exception. That’s why my team and I are working to fundamentally change and adapt our operation in this new reality. We have already closed our offices and canceled our in-person events. I am committed to keeping my team safe and healthy, so I asked them to stay home. It was the right thing to do, and I’m proud of them for adapting so quickly. I know the news can be difficult to look at these days — and I’ll be honest, the past few weeks have felt like an eternity. But we’re continuing our fight in the Senate to provide additional funding and support for folks and their families. And I won’t stop fighting until this is all over. In times like these, that’s the only thing we can do. The best way to fight back is to invest in a better — safer — future. Your $5 or $10 donation to our campaign is much more than just a few dollars. It’s a sign of your commitment to the fights that matter most. It’s a sign that even when we face challenges, we’re ready to keep working to make this country stronger. So, what do you say? Can you chip in a donation of $10 or any amount you can afford to support our campaign today? These are difficult times, so I only want you to pitch in if you are financially able to. Thank you in advance. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = As we rely more and more on emails just like this one to sustain our movement, my team will be working around the clock to make sure we’re stretching every one of your hard-earned dollars as far as we can. Anything you can give today would mean the world to me, but I completely understand if you can’t. We will get through this together. Stay safe. — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

| Peter,
Helping America's small businesses impacted by COVID-19 should not be a partisan issue. But now, Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and Congressional Democrats are blocking additional funds for the wildly successful and much needed Paycheck Protection Program.
The Paycheck Protection Program has already saved hundreds of thousands of jobs and is running short on money. But Pelosi and her followers like Colin Allred have let us down once again with despicable partisan displays. They've shown just how out of touch they are with what is going on today in America. clean_body: | | | | | | == | Peter, Helping America's small businesses impacted by COVID-19 should not be a partisan issue. But now, Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and Congressional Democrats are blocking additional funds for the wildly successful and much needed Paycheck Protection Program. The Paycheck Protection Program has already saved hundreds of thousands of jobs and is running short on money. But Pelosi and her followers like Colin Allred have let us down once again with despicable partisan displays. They've shown just how out of touch they are with what is going on today in America. == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Many small businesses won't survive three months under current economic conditions. They need help, not partisanship! == Nearly all of us who aren't D.C. politicians know someone who has been laid off, know a business owner on the brink of bankruptcy, or know somebody who has contracted COVID-19. name: GeorgetteGomez.org
subject: SIGN ON: COVID-19 relief for ALL “essential” workers.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17130044/183677084/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTY4OWU0Ni1kNDdkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d66d0c5NBQVNuhIZZiKMPa27SaHXLJIa-BXXuRFLatk=&emci=1c6ef750-ca7d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=95689e46-d47d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=8780864)
Friend --

Right now, hundreds of thousands of undocumented workers in California are considered "essential" by our government. They pay taxes, but were completely left out of the recent stimulus bill that passed in Congress.

We are asking folks to risk their lives and work during this pandemic, but are offering no help in return. That must change:

[**Will you join Georgette in calling on our state and federal governments to provide relief to undocumented workers in any upcoming stimulus package?** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17130045/183677085/-821253994?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTY4OWU0Ni1kNDdkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d66d0c5NBQVNuhIZZiKMPa27SaHXLJIa-BXXuRFLatk=&emci=1c6ef750-ca7d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=95689e46-d47d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=8780864) **[Sign the Letter](https://secure.ngpvan.com/a53usZ4lyUuoTuoU34R7WA2)** **Late last week, Georgette sent a letter to Gov. Gavin Newsom urging him to adopt key measures to address the needs of our undocumented communities.**

Here’s some of what she’s pushing for: **-** Providing individuals with immediate cash relief like everyone else
**-** Allocating $10 million to community-based organizations to deliver cash benefits for groceries, rent, medicine, and more
**-** Broadening eligibility for the Earned Income Tax Credit to immigrants Undocumented workers are putting their health at risk and contributing greatly to our regional economy. We cannot leave them behind, so we’re asking you to sign on to help move this forward:

clean_body: | Friend -- Right now, hundreds of thousands of undocumented workers in California are considered "essential" by our government. They pay taxes, but were completely left out of the recent stimulus bill that passed in Congress. We are asking folks to risk their lives and work during this pandemic, but are offering no help in return. That must change: Late last week, Georgette sent a letter to Gov. Gavin Newsom urging him to adopt key measures to address the needs of our undocumented communities. Here’s some of what she’s pushing for: - Providing individuals with immediate cash relief like everyone else - Allocating $10 million to community-based organizations to deliver cash benefits for groceries, rent, medicine, and more - Broadening eligibility for the Earned Income Tax Credit to immigrants Undocumented workers are putting their health at risk and contributing greatly to our regional economy. We cannot leave them behind, so we’re asking you to sign on to help move this forward: Thank you, Team Georgette | Georgette Gómez is the first LGBTQ Latina elected San Diego City Council President. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Today, alongside Representative Ro Khanna, I'm proposing an Essential Workers Bill of Rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Essential workers are the backbone of our nation's response to coronavirus -- and we need to have their backs. Today, alongside Representative Ro Khanna, I'm proposing an Essential Workers Bill of... | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257b8/45c30650/1f45f103b/66e96444/2317306656/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Right now, we're seeing Americans stepping up, giving back, and taking care of each other -- and that's especially true when it comes to essential workers on the frontlines of this pandemic.

Doctors, nurses, other health care workers, grocery store and drug store employees, domestic workers, food service workers, government employees, janitorial staff, farm workers, delivery drivers, warehouse workers, transportation workers, child care workers, and other essential workers are putting their health on the line every time they clock in.

But many of them are working in high-risk conditions without appropriate protective equipment, adequate safety standards, or basic job protections. And reports show that these workers may be contracting COVID-19 at a higher rate than the general public.

Essential workers are the backbone of our nation's response to coronavirus -- and we need to have their backs.

**Today, alongside Representative Ro Khanna, I 'm proposing an Essential Workers Bill of Rights to ensure safe working conditions, fair pay, paid leave, health care security, support for child care, and more.

[I need you with me in the fight to get this done. Add your name if you agree: Congress's next coronavirus relief package must include an Essential Workers Bill of Rights to protect frontline workers during this public health emergency.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257b8/45c30650/1f45f103b/66e96447/2317306656/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVExMlBfU0dOX0xBQl9FXzIwMjAwNDEzX1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-wd-essential-workers?source=EMQ12P_SGN_LAB_E_20200413_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Here's what we're fighting for:
1. **Health and safety protections,** including personal protective equipment provided by employers at no cost to workers.

2. **Robust premium compensation** that provides meaningful compensation for essential work.

3. **Protections for collective bargaining agreements.**

4. **Truly universal paid sick leave and family and medical leave.**

5. **Protections for whistleblowers.** Workers who witness unsafe conditions must be able to openly identify their concerns and have them addressed, without fear of retaliation.

6. **An end to worker misclassification** that lets employers avoid providing the full suite of benefits and protections available to employees.

7. **Health care security.** We must use public programs to provide no-cost health care for all, regardless of immigration or insurance status, so that essential workers get the care they need during this crisis.

8. **Support for child care** to ensure essential workers have access to free, reliable, safe, healthy, and high-quality child care and commit robust funding to help struggling child care providers during this pandemic.

9. **Treat workers as experts.** Essential workers, and their unions and organizations, must be at the table in developing responses to coronavirus.

10. **Hold corporations accountable for protecting workers.** Taxpayer dollars that have been handed to corporations should go to help workers, not wealthy CEOs, rich shareholders, or the president's cronies.

Here's what it comes down to: We must recognize the critical contribution these essential workers are making to our health and our economy during this crisis.

Every day, essential workers are answering the call to protect the most vulnerable and keep life as we know it moving forward.

**Essential workers are fighting for us, so it is our responsibility to fight for them.

[Add your name, and together, we'll demand an Essential Workers Bill of Rights.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257b8/45c30650/1f45f103b/66e96447/2317306656/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVExMlBfU0dOX0xBQl9FXzIwMjAwNDEzX1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-wd-essential-workers?source=EMQ12P_SGN_LAB_E_20200413_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

We have a long road ahead of us, but I'm confident that if we stand together, fight together, and persist, we will make it through this time of crisis.

Stay safe, and thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257b8/45c30650/1f45f103b/66e96447/2317306656/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVExMlBfU0dOX0xBQl9FXzIwMjAwNDEzX1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-wd-essential-workers?source=EMQ12P_SGN_LAB_E_20200413_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257b8/45c30650/1f45f103b/66e96446/2317306656/VEsD/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.facebook.com/ElizabethWarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257b8/45c30650/1f45f103b/66e96449/2317306656/VEsA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://twitter.com/ewarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257b8/45c30650/1f45f103b/66e96448/2317306656/VEsB/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.instagram.com/elizabethwarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257b8/45c30650/1f45f103b/66e9644b/2317306656/VEsO/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrj-0FxK19tgUR2EbHkBBGg/videos") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257b8/45c30650/1f45f103b/66e9644a/2317306656/VEsP/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.flickr.com/photos/elizabethwarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257b8/45c30650/1f45f103b/66e9644d/2317306656/VEsHBQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://medium.com/@teamwarren")

name: Hickenlooper.com
subject: Fox News Alert “The RNC says it’s launching a seven-figure ad buy praising President Trump’s handling of the federal response to the coronavirus pandemic.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
You need to see this quote from _Fox News_ , folks:
> **“The RNC says it’s launching a seven-figure ad buy praising President Trump’s handling of the federal response to the coronavirus pandemic.”**
This new _seven-figure ad buy_ targeting battleground states comes right on the heels of Mitch McConnell’s super PAC launching a _$67 million_ advertising campaign targeting Senate races in key states -- including Colorado. Our mid-month fundraising deadline is just days away -- and we need to make sure we have the necessary resources to respond to this wave of outside spending. But the truth is our fundraising has taken an expected dip in the last few weeks, and we might have to cut our budget at such a critical moment. subject: Emergency Primary Fund: OPEN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
When my campaign decided we were going to launch in October, at that point, we had allocated our budget for the next 13 months. We had everything spel Peter, When my campaign decided we were going to launch in October, at that point, we had allocated our budget for the next 13 months. We had everything spelled out to a T – mail sends, radio ads, yard signs, television promotional ads, and all of the details.
One thing we did not account for: A global pandemic that would rattle our lives tremendously.
Now, with our primary pushed back because of COVID-19, we’re facing a big problem. We didn’t budget for the extra two months of battling that we must now gear up for.

body:
Have you joined one my tele-town halls or a Facebook Live yet? New dates >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/03e0e9ffc975a881/aa5cd5094d0d57d1c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, Since switching our town halls to being “all digital," I’ve hosted multiple tele-town halls focusing on different areas around the state. The feedback has been tremendously helpful, and I’ve been thrilled to see the turnout. This week, we’ve added TWO more tele-town halls plus a Facebook Live that I hope you can join us for! **Grafton, Carroll & Coös Tele-Town Hall**
**DATE** : Tuesday, April 14th
**TIME** : 1:00PM
**Dial-In From Home** : 603-506-4097
**RSVP** : **[https://bit.ly/rsvp-4-13](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/03e0e9ffc975a881/172f8f487e1f1ed2c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** **Facebook Live with Corky Messner
DATE: **Wednesday, April 15th**
TIME:** 1:00PM**
RSVP:[https://bit.ly/rsvp-facebook-live](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/03e0e9ffc975a881/0a622cb68eb06d20c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** **Merrimack Valley Tele-Town Hall**
**DATE** : Thursday, April 16th
**TIME** : 6:30PM
**Dial-In From Home** : 603-506-4097

I hope you can join us during one of our tele-town halls. Again, all you need to do is dial 603-506-4097 from your phone when it begins, and you’ll be patched in! name: Tom Cotton
subject: The China Virus - poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
I've been under attack. The mainstream media has been slamming me for calling the coronavirus the 'China virus.' They're telling me to back down, be politically correct, and don't offend the Chinese Communist Party.
Click here to [unsubscribe](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42252777&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTQwMzE2NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,

I've been under attack. The mainstream media has been slamming me for calling the coronavirus the 'China virus.'

They're telling me to back down, be politically correct, and _don 't offend the Chinese Communist Party._

Peter, because you've been one of my top supporters, I want to tell you **why** I'm calling this the China virus.
* China arrested the first doctors who warned about this virus
* China pressured the World Health Organization to claim the virus could not be transmitted by humans even though China knew it could
* China allowed flights out of Wuhan to other countries after banning flights from Wuhan to the rest of China
* China bought up much of the world's medical equipment
* China banned research into the origins of the virus -- _unless approved by the Chinese Communist Party_

**The virus came from China and China 's lies caused the pandemic. They are responsible. And that's why I'm going to continue to call this the China virus. **

Do you agree that it's more important to be truthful than to be politically correct?

Please select one in my poll.
****
[******☐ YES: ****We should call this the China virus because China is responsible. **](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=NDIyNTI3NzcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTQwMzE2NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[******☐ NO:**** It's more important to be politically correct and not offend China. **](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=NDIyNTI3NzcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTQwMzE2NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Please, let me know what you think.

In service,

Tom

| |

name: Team IDP
subject: We wanted to tell you first, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | The 2020 Indiana Democratic Party State Convention will be held virtually this year. We want to bring Hoosier Democrats from around the state together – safely. So, we’re holding the Convention online, and delegates are casting their votes by mail to nominate our next Attorney General and Lieutenant Governor. What does that mean? Well, for one, we’re not letting the virus slow down or stop our nominating process. There’s just too much at stake in 2020 for that. Two, it means state delegates can still vote on our Party’s nominee for Attorney General, Lieutenant Governor, and delegates to the DNC National Convention. Voting by mail is safe, secure, and convenient, and we are working to ensure that any voting done online is equally secure – and that accommodations are made for those who need them. A virtual convention gives us the flexibility to ensure delegates in contested races can participate in the convention. Three, Hoosier Democrats will still be able to hear from our candidates, as we intend to provide those opportunities to Democrats across the state. Look, we know Hoosiers are adapting all over the state. So are we. We can’t wait for June 13, we’ll be announcing more details in the coming weeks, and we can’t thank you enough for your flexibility and understanding. Stay safe, Team IDP |
