name: Team Kennedy
subject: We need to institute national vote by mail [Sign If you agree]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390106/55b66746/23aa8937/80e02f6/1325677721/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | Last week in Wisconsin, we saw folks faced with a choice no American should ever have to make: a choice between their health and their constitutional right to vote. We saw lines upwards of five hours long... to vote... in the middle of a pandemic. Lines wrapped around city blocks. Americans determined to have their voices heard left their homes in the middle of a public health crisis to cast their ballot. But the simple truth is that they shouldn't have had to. **That's exactly why Joe is calling to institute national vote by mail -- now. ** Waiting in long lines at this moment is putting lives at risk. We have no choice but to make it possible for every registered voter to exercise their constitutional right by mail -- without having to weigh doing their democratic duty against protecting their health or the health of their loved ones. **Sign your name now if you agree with Joe: We need national vote by mail.** [Sign the Petition](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390106/55b66746/23aa8937/80e02f7/1325677721/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/petition/vote-by-mail/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-04-vote-by-mail-email") Voters shouldn't have to choose between risking their lives to vote in person or forfeiting their right to choose representation. We need national vote by mail. And a secure and accessible way to do so. Stay safe. Stay well. Team Kennedy P.S. Sending love and strength to you and your family. These coming weeks are expected to be among the hardest we've ever experienced as a nation. We hope you are well, healthy, and safe. |
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts.
---|---
| This email was sent by **[Joe Kennedy](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390106/55b66746/23aa8937/80e02f0/1325677721/VEsF/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/")**.

name: Taylor, MJ for Texas
subject: Campaign recap
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890371/7f51f7bc/4f410cfb/4ef126e2/1448743957/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter, let's recap what's been going on in the campaign over the last few months:
> **FIRST** \-- MJ took **first place in the Texas primary** and advanced to the runoff election.
>
> **THEN** \-- due to COVID-19, **the May runoff was pushed back until July** , leaving us with even less time between the runoff and the general election.
>
> **SO NOW** \-- we have a generous matching offer on EVERY single **donation made before tonight 's midnight deadline** to help us build the campaign we need to win in November!
**Donating today will have twice the impact on our campaign, and it 'll get MJ that much closer to defeating Sen. Cornyn in November. Please pitch in now if you can!** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

Texas Finance Director
Team MJ

name: Save =?utf-8?b?TWlubmVzb3Rh4oCZcw==?= Senate Seat
subject: BREAKING: The Republican National Committee just launched over $1M in ads to support Trump in battleground states
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The media can’t rewrite history
body:
Last month, most Americans surveyed by Gallup approved of President Trump’s Coronavirus response. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ea1eac7b82&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • April 13, 2020
---
| | |
# **The media can’t rewrite history**

**Last month,** most Americans surveyed by Gallup [approved of President Trump’s](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=38792ec827&e=3ee4985eea) Coronavirus response. Hospitals, state governments, and Federal agencies all earned positive reviews, too. The only institution that most people didn’t trust? The news media.

**Many in the media** got the story wrong from the start. They insisted the virus posed [no real threat](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4a0f70ce49&e=3ee4985eea) to Americans. They joined Democrats and the World Health Organization in attacking President Trump’s early [China travel restrictions](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6a1e1072e5&e=3ee4985eea) as unnecessary, even “xenophobic.” They parroted [Chinese government propaganda](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=deb0192fde&e=3ee4985eea) to make their case.

**Responsible journalists** and politicians would own up to these failures and vow to fix them. Instead, irresponsible ones are attempting to rewrite history.

**While they downplayed** the virus and its risks, President Trump took action. Here’s just a sample of what his Administration has done over the past 3 months:
* **On January 29** , the President assembled his Coronavirus Task Force. Two days later, he declared a Public Health Emergency and restricted travel from China.

* **On February 4** , President Trump vowed to protect Americans in his State of the Union Address and issued Emergency Use Authorization for Medical Devices. On February 24, he requested $2.5 billion from Congress to combat the virus’ spread.

* **On March 6** , the President signed Coronavirus preparedness funding into law. Between March 11 and March 18, he restricted travel from Europe, declared a National Emergency, issued aggressive national Coronavirus Guidelines, and signed the Family First Response Act. By the end of March, he’d sign a historic $2.2 trillion economic relief package negotiated by the Administration into law.

* **By April 9** , more than 2 million Americans had been tested for Coronavirus—by far the most testing of any country on Earth. The same day, Vice President Mike Pence announced that the Paycheck Protection Program had already approved more than $125 billion in forgivable loans in fewer than 5 full days of operation.

**When pundits are wrong,** their instinct is to divide Americans, not unite them. Real leaders, Democrat or Republican, don’t do this: They work together to get things done. This morning, Gov. Andrew Cuomo (D-NY) highlighted his working relationship with President Trump, who he praised for delivering on his promise to help New York.

**“If you do the right thing** by New York, I’ll say it,” Gov. Cuomo said.

[“He has delivered for New York.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ebdfb99b93&e=3ee4985eea)

**_RealClearPolitics_** : [The media just “can’t help themselves.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=22523468f0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **WATCH: First Lady Melania Trump reads Easter story**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9be7f3d07a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **The White House’s** South Lawn is usually filled with families and children playing the day after Easter Sunday. This [annual “Egg Roll,”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0865175625&e=3ee4985eea) as it’s called, is an American tradition dating back to the presidency of Rutherford B. Hayes in 1878.

**“Since we’re not able** to celebrate the traditional Easter Egg Roll on the grounds of the White House this year, I want to take a moment to wish everyone a Happy Easter and read one of my favorite children’s books,” Mrs. Trump said in a video message.

**Her choice** : “The Little Rabbit,” by Nicola Killen.

** **[See submissions for the White House Easter Egg colorings!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3ff7053a1a&e=3ee4985eea)

🎬 [President Trump records Easter video for Americans](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=eb5871c507&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump and members of the White House Coronavirus Task Force at a press briefing** | April 10, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b7b679c0ca&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1c299ca20c&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=ea5b5dd796)
---

name: Reverend (personal)
subject: falling short, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend: **With just hours until our critical midnight deadline, we 're still falling 392 members short of our goal, and we need your urgent help to get back on track.**
Right now, my Republican opponent is pouring $20 million of her own fortune into this race to defeat me - and a Trump-linked super PAC just named Georgia one of its top targets __ of the cycle.
The good news is that Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says we CAN flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats. We can take on Mitch McConnell, fight for working people and restore moral leadership to our government - but not without your immediate grassroots support.
**With Senate control at stake, can I count on you to give $5 or more right now to become one of the 2020 Members we need to win in Georgia and take back the Senate for Democrats?**

name: NH Senate Republicans
subject: Read Sen. Bradley's latest column about the COVID-19 crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Senate Republican PAC, Jeb Bradley Chairman
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzk4ODAzNjM1NDMyODU1NDY1JmM9czZ1NSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzc1NTg2NDQmZD14NXU3ZTdl.0EaPuUIYWuO5vsOQVM5cjZTdxAM4iKzsLWTEsIBcNwA)
| | |
---
| [ ](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzk4ODAzNjM1NDMyODU1NDY1JmM9czZ1NSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzc1NTg2NDYmZD1uOGU4ZDNj.aYEEpOZ6SX_7OzF42Ouv8WiLnXgg2w_R6URjEajD5xw)
---
---
| |
---
| **Continuing Efforts to Combat the Corona Virus** By Sen. Jeb Bradley - April 13, 2020 Much has changed in the way we all conduct our lives over the last several weeks due to the pernicious Corona Virus. People are staying home. When leaving our homes for essential services we are wearing masks and gloves. Many businesses have closed but those deemed essential are working overtime to provide food and other necessities to our friends and neighbors. Over 100,000 hard-working New Hampshire residents are now unemployed. Meanwhile hospitals and other health care providers have postponed elective procedures to prepare for the expected surge in virus cases to occur in late April or early May. Many people have contacted me about how they and their families or small businesses can stay afloat in these troubling times. The best initiative for small business owners is the federal Payroll Protection Program which enables a business with 500 or fewer employees to borrow up to $10 million to cover eight weeks of payroll. Critically important --- this loan turns into a grant provided the business retains or rehires employees. Businesses should apply for this grant through local community or commercial banks. The rapid rollout of this initiative has created some confusion among business owners about documentation required. Documentation is obviously necessary to prevent waste, fraud and abuse of taxpayer funds. So, business owners will have to provide proof of payroll, proof of being in business as of February 15, 2020, various IRS forms, and documentation for independent contractors. Businesses that have successfully completed the application have indicated that dealing with a bank they already have a relationship with has eased some of the paperwork burdens as the bank would already have much of the needed documentation. There are 37 banks in New Hampshire that are Small Business Administration certified lenders. That list can be obtained at [www.nhbankers.com/coronavirus](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzk4ODAzNjM1NDMyODU1NDY1JmM9czZ1NSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzc1NTg2NDgmZD1pOWw2bTNl.w0PIOhNNzpPO2nCrC0O_EExWRItiLs6aqwlNiszrOYQ). A week after applications could be submitted almost 2000 loans to NH businesses have been approved with a value of $405 million protecting nearly 11,000 jobs according to the NH Bankers Association. I will continue to advocate for bridge loan funding administered by Regional Development Corporations (RDCs). These funds can come from New Hampshire’s allocation of federal funds. These RDCs know local small businesses and are very nimble helping them when they need help the most. People have also asked me about unemployment compensation. Apply for these benefits at the Department of Employment Security [www.nhes.nh.gov](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzk4ODAzNjM1NDMyODU1NDY1JmM9czZ1NSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzc1NTg2NTAmZD1uMnYxejZn.lYNzzYeO4ZIUWlIbKWz4lM5rzHmIjx4FJOmjBp9_RY4). The initial difficultly of applying for unemployment was due to the large number of applicants. Those issues have largely been resolved. Nevertheless, people should look for the red box application link on the website and the directions for when to apply. Governor Sununu increased the minimum amount of unemployment and the federal legislation funded a temporary $600 weekly amount on top of state benefits. It should be noted that self-employed individuals who have had their business income interrupted can also receive unemployment. Remember that you need to apply every week to continue to receive the Corona Virus related unemployment benefit. Providing strong leadership, Governor Sununu recently announced the formation of the Governor’s Office for Emergency Relief and Recovery and named Banking Commissioner Jerry Little to lead this effort. A minimum of $1.25 billion will be provided to New Hampshire from the recent federal legislation. While final federal guidance on allowed uses of these funds has yet to be released, these resources need to be used for expenses related to the Corona Virus. New Hampshire’s hospitals which have lost significant revenue due to reserving facilities for Corona Virus related cases can receive funding as can other health care providers. These funds can also be used to support our unemployment trust fund and the Bureau of Economic Affairs as they work to assist employers. Presumably funding can also be used to support local communities that have virus related expenses and not for profits such as food pantries that are stretched thin providing assistance to hard working people who have lost jobs. It is important to note that the Attorney General’s Office has warned of potential scams involving federal funds. Government entities are not sending emails asking for personal information so carefully scrutinize any correspondence you may receive. More information can be obtained at the [www.doj.nh.gov/covid-19-scams/](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzk4ODAzNjM1NDMyODU1NDY1JmM9czZ1NSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzc1NTg2NTImZD1iMWE1czhi.pXxUZRXVjx_8b9MD36OZz4AN3bL5GJ-0Y2YmawNS9PQ). Lastly, many people are asking when life can begin to resume some semblance of normalcy. That question is being asked because the economic consequences for our state and nation are profound and because the number of new cases in hot spot areas has begun to plateau. Despite these hopeful signs – public health officials warn it is too early to stop doing what we are doing. All of us need to continue to practice social distancing and wearing masks. Testing for the virus is expanding in New Hampshire and around the country. Access to testing is vital to opening up the economy. Vaccines are being developed and medications are showing positive results. I hope and also believe that we will begin to resume normal lives sooner rather than later. It is critical to be driven by real data and smart practices that are likely to be cautiously phased in order to protect against a virus relapse. Patience and optimism are vital. So too is gratitude for those on the front lines of fighting the virus: health care providers, supermarket workers, pharmacy employees, postal workers, first responders and many others. They are truly selfless heroes. As always contact me with questions at [603-387-2365](tel:603-387-2365).

name: Christy Smith
subject: A race filled with compassion, leadership, and heart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

We are seeing right now the critical importance of good leadership.

States that haven't taken action early in this crisis are struggling right now, while right here in California, we no longer have a shortage of personal protective equipment because of the quick work of Governor Newsom. He put his head down, didn't listen to the attacks from Republicans, and got to work to protect his constituents.

We need that type of leadership in Congress as well -- and that's why I'm more motivated than ever in this election. I will cut through the noise from the president and the Republican party and will get right to work to make sure we are prepared to get through the next phase of the pandemic.

**But to be honest with you, Peter, I'm a little stressed about the amount of money Republicans are spending on this race.**

Republican special interest groups are pumping a lot of cash into Garcia's campaign coffers, while we won't accept a nickel from corporate PACs. It's having a big impact. That's why our race rating was changed to a Toss-Up by two reputable political insiders last week.

**[In response, we set an ambitious -- but necessary -- fundraising goal to meet by midnight. If you have a few spare dollars, can you please chip in to my campaign?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8a2/29776869/a3ed85f/569f455e/2031343693/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTNfdmJtdXBkYXRlLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200413_vbmupdate-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8a2/29776869/a3ed85f/569f455f/2031343693/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTNfdmJtdXBkYXRlLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200413_vbmupdate-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8a2/29776869/a3ed85f/569f4558/2031343693/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTNfdmJtdXBkYXRlLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200413_vbmupdate-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8a2/29776869/a3ed85f/569f4559/2031343693/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTNfdmJtdXBkYXRlLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200413_vbmupdate-full&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8a2/29776869/a3ed85f/569f455a/2031343693/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTNfdmJtdXBkYXRlLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200413_vbmupdate-full&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8a2/29776869/a3ed85f/569f455b/2031343693/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTNfdmJtdXBkYXRlLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200413_vbmupdate-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8a2/29776869/a3ed85f/569f455e/2031343693/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTNfdmJtdXBkYXRlLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200413_vbmupdate-full")
This race is neck-and-neck, and given the unusual circumstances of this campaign, it is hard for anyone to predict the outcome.

But what I know is this: We are running a race filled with compassion, leadership, and heart. We are focused on lifting others up and giving people a helping hand when they need it -- **and right now, a lot of people need it.**

These qualities are what we need in Congress right now, and they are what I will bring to Washington when elected.

**[I need you to step up right now to help us cross the finish line with the resources we need. Ballots will be hitting mailboxes any day, and our campaign is upping our voter outreach efforts despite the onslaught of negativity from my opponent. Can you make a contribution of any amount today?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8a2/29776869/a3ed85f/569f455e/2031343693/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTNfdmJtdXBkYXRlLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200413_vbmupdate-full")**

Thank you so much. I hope you and your loved ones are safe and well.

\-- Christy
[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8a2/29776869/a3ed85f/569f455e/2031343693/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTNfdmJtdXBkYXRlLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200413_vbmupdate-full")

Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._

Peter,
We knew this race was going to be a fight from the very beginning. **This race is going to COME DOWN TO THE WIRE.**

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Hoosier companies keep stepping up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Every day of the COVID-19 pandemic has revealed acts of Hoosier ingenuity, compassion and generosity. | | |
---|---|---
Friend,

_**“The unprecedented challenge before us has revealed the true Indiana ethos. It has revealed who we are and who we aspire to be.” –Governor Holcomb**_

Every day of the COVID-19 pandemic has revealed acts of Hoosier ingenuity, compassion and generosity.

Today we learned that Hoosier companies—in every corner of our state—are stepping up in a _**big way**_ to create personal protective equipment (PPE) for our doctors, nurses and _**all Hoosier healthcare workers**_ on the front lines.

Hoosier companies have refitted their operations and have bolstered Indiana’s PPE supply with orders of:
* 1,000,000 _**face masks**_
* 763,000 _**face shields**_
* 141,000 _**gloves**_
* 68,000 _**gowns**_
* 10,000 _**goggles**_
* 6,700 _**bottles of hand sanitizer**_

Indiana has already _**received and distributed 375,000 pieces of PPE**_ from this order and expects to receive _**150,000 more pieces this week! **_

All told, these companies will produce over _**2 million**_ PPE items, ensuring those caring for Hoosiers infected with COVID-19 have the tools they need to do their jobs _**safely.**_

Hoosiers are putting their families and their neighbors before themselves. It is inspiring to see the number of acts of generosity happening throughout Indiana.

And, while we’re inspired by this _**we’re not surprised. **_

This has been the _**Indiana way**_ for over 200 years.

_**“We’re not out of the woods, but we can see the clearing ahead.” –Governor Holcomb.**_

Governor Holcomb reminded us that we’re still in the first quarter of our response to COVID-19, but we know how the next three quarters are going to play out.

_**Your actions have made a positive difference** _on where we are today. Indiana got at this early, acted quickly and we learned very early that a good defense will allow us to get to an equally productive offense that much quicker.

We’ll return to life as “normal” in the months ahead. We are one day closer, and there’s only one way to get there – together.

#INThisTogether,
-Your Holcomb Crew
---
---
|
|
| |
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Will=20Douglas=20for=20Texas=20House?=
subject: Campaign Update
body:
See below for a brief recap of our past week, including my Facebook Live with J.J. Koch and our hand sanitizer donation to the Dallas County Sheriff.. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/willdouglasfortexas/campaign-update-april-13-2020?e=4f010155df)
---
| | [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=29bec4340e&e=4f010155df)
---
| | Friends,

Every generation is tested. Today, the test we face is the greatest public health crisis in a century, coupled with the economic damage that comes with slowing the spread of this awful virus.

Like every generation of Americans, we will pass this test. We will rise above politics, and come together, even as we are forced to remain apart.

I miss the campaign trail. I miss meeting all of you, learning about your lives, and sharing ideas for making Texas better. The time for that will come again. I look forward to the parades, and the debates, and the other rituals of our grand democratic traditions. But for now, be safe and be well.

See below for a brief recap of our past week, including my Facebook Live with J.J. Koch and our hand sanitizer donation to the Dallas County Sheriff's Office...
---
|
---
| [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=1fbb087365&e=4f010155df)
---
Last Tuesday, I had a great, informative discussion with J.J. Koch on Facebook Live regarding COVID-19 and how it has affected our communities. Please click through to watch a replay.
|
---
| [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=b7b9da34bc&e=4f010155df "Will Douglas - Turning Everclear Into Hand Sanitizer")
---
Here I am in the lab at my pharmacy explaining how to turn Everclear into hand sanitizer! Please click through to watch.
|
---
| [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=3b73daf0ef&e=4f010155df)
---
After compounding the hand sanitizer at my lab, I donated 110 bottles of it to the Dallas County Sheriff's Office so that our first responders can continue to stay safe on the front lines. Please click through to watch.
|
---
|
---
On Saturday, I ended a very busy week by making phone calls to help register new Republicans! Though we can't block-walk and knock on doors, that doesn't mean our field operation can stop. We'll continue working 24/7 to defeat the Democrats in November.
|
---
| _**News Updates on COVID-19**_
* **Global:**[Total](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=b0b3c5709b&e=4f010155df) confirmed cases as of 3:30pm: 1,904,566 \-- Total deaths: 118,459.
* **U.S.:** [Total](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=e0107d75fd&e=4f010155df) confirmed cases as of 3:30pm: 572,587 \-- Total deaths: 23,078.
* **Texas** : [Total](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=d0d1244a2f&e=4f010155df) confirmed cases as of 3:30pm: 13,906 -- Total deaths: 287.
* **Federal government update:** President Trump [said](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=2d0e6f8ab0&e=4f010155df) Monday he would make a decision -- "in conjunction" with governors and other officials -- on reopening the economy "shortly," as the White House forms a second coronavirus task force focused on that goal.
* **Texas government update:** Governor Greg Abbott on Monday again [foreshadowed](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=e429f5c8b0&e=4f010155df) a potential executive order later this week to begin the process of reopening the state's economy.

---
|
---
| _**Help keep Texas healthy**_
---
| Right now, we are entering a highly crucial phase in the effort to stop the spread of COVID-19. I have no doubt that we will come out of this stronger and more united, but that’s going to require all of us working together to keep our neighborhoods, our state, and our country healthy. Below are some quick tips that you can follow to help flatten the curve. Click each icon to learn more.
---
| [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=05cd786467&e=4f010155df)
---
[ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=84087679d5&e=4f010155df)
---
| [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=069d03e61a&e=4f010155df)
---
[ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=5e87ea079c&e=4f010155df)
---
| Stay healthy and stay safe. We will get through this.
For Texas,

Will Douglas
Republican Nominee for TX-HD-113
---
|
---
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=a19895578a&e=4f010155df "CONTRIBUTE")

**Our mailing address is:**
Will Douglas for TexasPO Box 496955Garland, TX 75049-6955
[Add us to your address book](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=0b66be983a)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=0b66be983a&e=4f010155df) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=0b66be983a&e=4f010155df&c=5c62bbd05c).

name: James Mackler
subject: This is more urgent than ever →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
We *need* to expand Medicaid.
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa150/18d6a294/4cb06096/26d6137f/1961467679/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | Look -- we _need_ to expand Medicaid. Extremists have refused to expand Medicaid in Tennessee, and Washington Republicans even tried to gut funding for this life-saving program. Their actions jeopardize the health of working Americans and seniors who depend on Medicaid for essential care. [_**TELL OUR LEADERS TO EXPAND MEDICAID ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa150/18d6a294/4cb06096/26d6137c/1961467679/VEsE/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200413_NAT") Right now, access to health care is absolutely critical. Uninsured Americans with COVID-19 could end up having to pay an estimated average _of $73,300 for treatment_ \-- 10 times more than someone with insurance. And even before the current health crisis, more than half of Americans avoided going to the doctor because they're afraid of not being able to afford their bills. **We can 't let the outrageous cost of care to prevent Tennesseans from protecting their health -- especially during a pandemic.** [_**Please add your name to mine and call on our leaders to expand Medicaid and protect the health of those in need.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa150/18d6a294/4cb06096/26d6137c/1961467679/VEsF/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200413_NAT") In service, James
---

|
---
| | Paid for by James Mackler for U.S. Senate
---
James Mackler is a member of the Tennessee National Guard and a former member of the U.S. Army.
